_meta.reference_note: annual_spend_aed is the source of truth. spend_share is computed by the Profile core as annual_spend_aed / sum(all annual_spend_aed). The sum equals 480,000,000 exactly.

field_definitions.name: trading name
field_definitions.annual_spend_aed: yearly spend with this supplier in AED
field_definitions.skus_dependent: finished-goods models that use this supplier's component
field_definitions.skus_single_sourced: subset of skus_dependent with no qualified alternative
field_definitions.weeks_of_cover: on-hand cover on this supplier's critical items in weeks
field_definitions.description: plain one-line explanation of what the supplier provides and its role in GCI's chiller production, grounded in the real category and dependency profile

suppliers.name: Rheinkomp Compressors
suppliers.description: Supplies the screw compressors at the heart of GCI's flagship district-cooling chillers, the single most critical component, with no qualified alternative on most models.

suppliers.name: Zhejiang Scroll Tech
suppliers.description: Supplies scroll compressors for GCI's mid-range chiller line: a second compressor source that partially reduces dependence on the German supplier.

suppliers.name: Milano Controls Srl
suppliers.description: Supplies building-management controllers and proprietary controller firmware for GCI's chillers; the firmware is sole-sourced, leaving many models tied to this one supplier.

suppliers.name: AlpenHX GmbH
suppliers.description: Supplies brazed-plate heat exchangers for GCI's chillers; a qualified alternative is permitted under contract, but several models still depend on this supplier today.

suppliers.name: Jiangxi Copper Tube
suppliers.description: Supplies copper tube and coil stock for heat exchangers: a commodity input with a qualified alternative, so low concentration risk despite meaningful spend.

suppliers.name: Bharat Copper Works
suppliers.description: Supplies copper tube and coil stock as GCI's second copper source: interchangeable commodity material that keeps concentration risk low.

suppliers.name: Marmara Steel
suppliers.description: Supplies structural steel and sheet for chiller frames and casings: a widely available commodity with multiple qualified sources.

suppliers.name: Guangdong EC Motors
suppliers.description: Supplies EC motors and condenser fans for GCI's chillers: drawn from a competitive market with qualified alternatives.

suppliers.name: Daikin Refrigerants JP
suppliers.description: Supplies refrigerant charge for GCI's cooling circuits: mostly substitutable, though one model depends on a single qualified grade.

suppliers.name: Shenzhen PCB Systems
suppliers.description: Supplies populated control boards and power electronics; multiple contract manufacturers can build to specification, so concentration risk is low.

suppliers.name: Bosch Sensortec
suppliers.description: Supplies temperature and pressure sensors for chiller controls: a catalogue component available from several distributors.

suppliers.name: Emerson Valve US
suppliers.description: Supplies expansion and service valves for the cooling circuit: largely substitutable, with one model tied to a single qualified valve.

suppliers.name: Gulf Insulation Co
suppliers.description: Supplies thermal insulation for chiller bodies and piping: a local UAE source with short lead times and readily available alternatives.

suppliers.name: Emirates Coatings
suppliers.description: Supplies protective and finish coatings for chiller enclosures: a local commodity input with multiple sources.

suppliers.name: Pune Fasteners
suppliers.description: Supplies fasteners and fixings used across GCI's product range: a generic commodity with abundant alternative suppliers.

suppliers.name: Dongguan Wiring
suppliers.description: Supplies wiring harnesses and cable assemblies for chiller electrical systems: build-to-print parts available from many vendors.

suppliers.name: Sharjah Metal Fab
suppliers.description: Provides sheet-metal fabrication for chiller panels and brackets: a local fabricator with very short lead times and substitutable capacity.

suppliers.name: Lombardia Pumps
suppliers.description: Supplies circulation pumps for chilled-water loops: a standard component with qualified alternative suppliers.

suppliers.name: Hangzhou Electric
suppliers.description: Supplies electrical components such as contactors and terminal blocks: catalogue parts with multiple sources.

suppliers.name: Foshan Brass
suppliers.description: Supplies brass fittings and connectors for the cooling circuit: a commodity input with interchangeable suppliers.

suppliers.name: RheinLub Oils
suppliers.description: Supplies compressor lubricants and refrigeration oils: a specified but widely available consumable.

suppliers.name: Chennai Mounts
suppliers.description: Supplies anti-vibration mounts and isolators for chiller assemblies: a low-value commodity with several sources.

suppliers.name: Izmir Driers
suppliers.description: Supplies filter-driers for the refrigeration circuit: a standard component available from multiple suppliers.

suppliers.name: Jebel Pack Co
suppliers.description: Supplies crating and protective packaging for finished chillers: a local commodity with short lead times and ample alternatives.

suppliers.name: Dubai Labels
suppliers.description: Supplies product labels, nameplates and documentation packs: a low-cost local consumable with many sources.
